stemHtml: The operating principle of an electronic torque meter is…

options.a: axial thrust and movement is generated when cylindrically cut gears are used to transfer power from one shaft to another.
options.b: axial thrust and movement is generated when helically cut gears are used to transfer power from one shaft to another.
options.c: as power is increased, the torque shaft twists.
options.d: as power is increased, the torque shaft expands.
